clause_ref: BS 5536:1978 — Recommendations for preparation of technical drawings and diagrams for acceptance purposes
_title: BS 5536 Line Conventions (UK reading of ISO 128)
_source: BS 5536:1978 — Recommendations for preparation of technical drawings
_note: BS 5536:1978 is the UK adaptation of ISO 128 line conventions for electrical drawings. Largely aligned with ISO 128:1996 but with UK-specific guidance on electrical schematic conventions.
uk_specific_notes: Single-line electrical schematics use the visible-outline width (0.35 mm) for the main cable runs
Symbol outlines use 0.35 mm for visibility on A4 prints
Annotation text uses 0.18 mm minimum for legibility (CIBSE Guide convention)
